# PHAssetCollectionType.album

**Case**

An album in the Photos app.

## Declaration

```swift
case album
```

## Discussion

Albums can be created in the Photos app or appear on an iOS device through iTunes sync.

## Constants

- **PHAssetCollectionType.smartAlbum**: A smart album whose contents update dynamically.
- **PHAssetCollectionType.moment**: A moment in the Photos app.
